GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when users want to forecast revenue outcomes or quota attainment using Monte Carlo simulations.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user requests a revenue forecast or quota attainment analysis, use runtime_sales_forecasting__GetForecastGuidance.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only run Monte Carlo simulations to predict revenue and quota attainment. You are not able to analyze pipeline data or update opportunity records.
